programme.title: Be-Reham
programme.desc: Kumar Anand, an honest police officer, gets into trouble after he accidentally kills a gangster at his ex-lover Mala's house.

programme.title: Choron Ki Baarat
programme.desc: Anju, a beautiful and spoilt woman, falls in love with a mysterious man, Shekhar. However, with time she realises that he has other motives.

programme.title: Khote Sikkay
programme.desc: An unknown horseback rider is after Jhanga, an evil and troublesome gangster who has terrorised everybody in the village, because he is responsible for his father's death.

programme.title: Dhund
programme.desc: After crashing his car on a foggy night, a man seeks help at a nearby home, where he encounters a dead man and a woman holding a gun. After hearing her sad story, he helps her hide the crime.

programme.title: Naalayak
programme.desc: Laxman has always been the black sheep of the family. He swindles his brother’s money to impress a girl.

programme.title: Aadmi Aur Insaan
programme.desc: Jai and Munish's friendship is ruined when both of them fall in love with the same girl, Meena. Things take a turn when Munish finds out Jai was involved in the case of a faulty railway bridge.

programme.title: Karm
programme.desc: Asha and Arvind are in love but are not allowed to marry by her astrologer father. They start living together and plan to start a family without getting married, but fate intervenes.

programme.title: Tyagi
programme.desc: Village-based Shankar makes his living as a farmer, living with his dad, and two brothers. He borrows money to fund his brothers education in the city. But once in the city they meet with the underworld and begin to carry on illegal activities.

programme.title: Ustaad
programme.desc: Shamsher Singh, a runaway criminal, pretends to love Asha and gets married to her. However, on the wedding night, Shamsher leaves Asha and never returns.

programme.title: Aadmi Aur Insaan
programme.desc: Jai and Munish's friendship is ruined when both of them fall in love with the same girl, Meena. Things take a turn when Munish finds out Jai was involved in the case of a faulty railway bridge.

programme.title: Choron Ki Baarat
programme.desc: Anju, a beautiful and spoilt woman, falls in love with a mysterious man, Shekhar. However, with time she realises that he has other motives.

programme.title: Khote Sikkay
programme.desc: An unknown horseback rider is after Jhanga, an evil and troublesome gangster who has terrorised everybody in the village, because he is responsible for his father's death.

programme.title: Dhund
programme.desc: After crashing his car on a foggy night, a man seeks help at a nearby home, where he encounters a dead man and a woman holding a gun. After hearing her sad story, he helps her hide the crime.

programme.title: Bandhan
programme.desc: A wastrel father and his righteous son have a showdown and the son is charged with his father's murder. Court-room drama follows as friends and family aren't sure whom to believe and testify for.

programme.title: Gair
programme.desc: An abandoned child raised by a wealthy household takes over the family business. However, he is resented by their natural son who, fueled by a bitter uncle, tries his best to make him lose face.

programme.title: Sunghursh
programme.desc: Bhawani Prasad, a criminal who poses as a holy man and is estranged from his wife and son, forcibly takes his grandson, Kundan, with him to follow in his footsteps.
